subject: Handle null case in `GroupVersionUpdater`
commit_message:
Handle null case in `GroupVersionUpdater`

- change in the final condition of `isGenerateGroupUUID`
- Added tests related to modified code

Issue-ID: SDC-2913
Signed-off-by: Chris Andre <chris.andre@yoppworks.com>
Change-Id: I22738f9f4922467209a16a4d6b3b78d7bfac11c9

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> @Vasyl: Did some work on this change request. Is it more in line with what you have in mind?

I noticed this class does not have test coverage 
https://sonarcloud.io/code?id=onap_sdc&selected=onap_sdc%3Acatalog-be%2Fsrc%2Fmain%2Fjava%2Forg%2Fopenecomp%2Fsdc%2Fbe%2Fcomponents%2Fimpl%2Fgroup%2FGroupVersionUpdater.java
I'd suggest to create unit test and test it properly, to ensure new code behaves, at least, same.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> > Patch Set 2:
> > 
> > @Vasyl: Did some work on this change request. Is it more in line with what you have in mind?
> 
> I noticed this class does not have test coverage 
> https://sonarcloud.io/code?id=onap_sdc&selected=onap_sdc%3Acatalog-be%2Fsrc%2Fmain%2Fjava%2Forg%2Fopenecomp%2Fsdc%2Fbe%2Fcomponents%2Fimpl%2Fgroup%2FGroupVersionUpdater.java
> I'd suggest to create unit test and test it properly, to ensure new code behaves, at least, same.

Not a bad idea indeed. It's just that:
- it's a private method (so hard to access from an external test class without hacks "à la PowerMockito")
- I assumed (wrongly apparently) that it would be covered by existing unit tests.

So, I'll work on this method and make it easier to test and submit a new CR with these changes + associated unit tests.
